description_long: This is a two-story urban house with a flat roof and a clean, modern facade. The front features a prominent balcony with classical balustrades above a large window, and several large rectangular windows with dark frames. The side and rear walls are mostly plain, with a few symmetrically placed windows providing natural light to the interior. The house is constructed primarily from concrete or stucco, with glass windows and metal or composite window frames. The balcony and window arrangement give the house a slightly classical touch, contrasting with the otherwise minimalist design. The entryway is understated, with a single main door beneath the balcony and no visible porch or steps.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a front balcony with classical balustrades. The facade is minimalist, with clean lines and a mix of concrete and glass.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, a large window, and a balcony with balustrades above.
description_view_1: Side view with two vertically aligned windows and the balcony extending from the left.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain wall and minimal window openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a single small window and two large windows, plus the balcony visible on the right.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door beneath a balcony, no visible porch or steps, minimal decorative elements
